item.title: Metabolome remodeling with reverse-engineered exclusive enteral nutrition in children with active Crohn's disease.
item.description: Inflammatory bowel diseases - For children with Crohn's disease (CD), dietary therapy with exclusive enteral nutrition (EEN) is effective in achieving clinical and biochemical remission. We investigated changes in metabolites i...

item.title: A pilot randomized trial on the usability and acceptability of an app (MyIBDDiet) to improve the self-management of anti-inflammatory diet for individuals with inflammatory bowel disease: A protocol paper.
item.description: PloS one - The role of diet in the management of inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) is increasingly recognized with recent guidelines providing specific dietary recommendations. Although mobile health apps targ...

item.title: Neonatal total parenteral nutrition and the risk of childhood autoimmune diseases: A nationwide population-based study of 2.3 million children.
item.description: Journal of autoimmunity - We evaluated the long-term risk of childhood autoimmune diseases following neonatal total parenteral nutrition (TPN) exposure using a massive nationwide cohort. Using the South Korean National Heal...

item.title: Assessment of Malnutrition in Crohn's Disease Patients: A Novel Risk Prediction Model with Dynamic Optimization Potential and Effectiveness Validation.
item.description: Journal of visualized experiments : JoVE - This study aimed to construct and validate a malnutrition risk prediction model combining multivariable logistic regression and machine learning for patients with Crohn's disease (CD), with the goa...
